prompt_pack.description: Second bounded Llama 3 compact-header context parity bucket for exact Llama 3.2 1B/3B rows. The synthetic recall prompt is intentionally longer than the checked 512 pack but still bounded to a 1024-token reference context, so prompt-token and generated-token parity can be compared without implying broad/full Llama support.

claim_boundary: Closes only the second bounded 1024-context pack for the exact Llama 3.2 3B Instruct Q8_0 row. It does not promote neighboring rows, other quantizations, model-native/larger context buckets beyond this checked pack, arbitrary GGUF/Jinja template execution, broad/full Llama-family support, production throughput, or portability support.
